scenario: Someone cut in front of me in line at the post office after I'd been waiting twenty minutes.
My manager gave my promotion to a colleague who joined six months after me.
The mechanic says my car needs a repair I just paid for at the same shop last month.
A neighbor's unleashed dog chased my child across the park.
The movers broke a mirror that's been in my family for four generations.
My favorite coffee shop raised prices 30% overnight with no warning.
A coworker leaked our team's salary numbers to another department.
The dentist billed me for a procedure I specifically declined.
An online seller shipped me a counterfeit product and is refusing to refund.
The city towed my car from a spot where there was no visible no-parking sign.
My internet has been out for five days and the provider won't give me a service credit.
A former client is threatening a bad review unless I do unpaid revisions.
The contractor disappeared after cashing the deposit check and hasn't responded in three weeks.
My flight was cancelled and the airline is offering a voucher instead of a refund, against federal rules.
A subordinate went over my head to complain about a decision I made.
The cable company charged me a $99 'service fee' for fixing a problem in their own equipment.
My child's school suspended him based on an incident I have video proof did not happen.
The parking garage is claiming it has no record of my car despite the stub in my hand.
A colleague took my slide deck, added her name, and presented it as her own.
The gym sold my personal information to a fitness app I never signed up for.
The grocery store charged me full price for items marked on sale.
My passport renewal has been 'in process' for four months with no updates.
A so-called tech consultant left my small business's network more broken than he found it, and kept the check.
The accountant filed my taxes a week late and is blaming my document delivery, which I can prove was on time.
My rental car came with a gas tank half empty and the company is charging me for a 'missed refuel.'
The meeting I flew across the country for was canceled the night before, with no offer to cover my flight.
My software license was auto-renewed at triple the rate and the vendor refuses to prorate a cancellation.
A bank teller was openly rude to my elderly mother during a simple deposit.
The moving truck I reserved last month isn't available today and the company offered a van half the size.
My landlord entered my apartment without the legally required notice while I was at work.
The university lost my transcript request for the third time this year.
A coworker keeps taking credit in front of leadership for work I'm doing after hours.
My online order arrived missing two items and the retailer is asking me to file a police report to process the refund.
The insurance adjuster is lowballing my claim by roughly half despite clear photos of the damage.
A delivery driver left a fragile package on my wet doorstep in the rain despite clear instructions.
My mechanic rounded a four-hour job into eight billable hours and calls it 'shop standard.'
The bakery screwed up my wedding cake order and is refusing a refund because 'it was still edible.'
A recruiter is leaking my interview status to my current employer.
The city raised my property tax assessment by 40% based on a comparable that isn't remotely comparable.
My dry cleaner ruined a suit and is offering me a discount on my next order instead of a replacement.
